title: Create: Legacy Copper+
description: Create: Legacy Copper for Create 6 and addons
body:
# Create: Legacy Copper+

This resourse pack change copper textures for create 5 copper
### Supported:

• Minecraft (Vanilla)

• Create 6

• Create: Diesel Generators

• TFMG

• Create: Propulsion Simulated

• Create: Aeronautics

• VS Logistics

• Create: Encased

• Create: Dragons Plus

• Create: Design and Decor

• Create: Framed

• Create: The Air War

• Supplementaries

• Cosmonautics

### The majority of the resource pack was created by one person, so the textures may be bad. If you don't like any of the textures, please write to me on Discord: Lexx987654321
